rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in assumptions and guarantees
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Maintain component type contracts in type scopes and implementation contracts in implementation scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid scopes relative to the referenced features
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for helper declarations and `const` for constants
Use `if ... then ... else` for branching logic
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees in invalid scopes relative to the referenced features
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
